_doc: Human-verified dosing corrections for CPG v6.2. The extractor (scripts/extract_pdf.mjs) overlays these onto the auto-extracted blocks, clears their flags, and marks them VERIFIED. Match by drug (required) + optional page + optional indication substring + optional `match` (substring of the field's current value, to pick one band). Omit `page` to fix every occurrence — the same dosing block is repeated on condition pages AND in pharmacology. Symbol convention: ↑ = 'and above' (≥), ↓ = 'and below' (≤).

corrections.note: 11 and above (≥11). Up-arrow glyph preferred over ≥. Applies to Allergy condition page (p42) and pharmacology (p142).
